titleStmt.title: SII 26.287: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 287. (A.R. No. 272 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a sandhyā lamp to the same temple in the same place as in No. 286 above by Koṟṟaṉ Koṟṟaṉ Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyāṉ Śelvappiḷḷai of Piḷḷaippākkam alias Kaiytavakaiytava-nallūr in Māgaṉūrnāḍu in Śeṅgāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. A Śivabrāhmaṇa who had the right of worship in the temple, named Āḷumpirāṉ Uḍaiyapiḷḷai alias Sadāśiva-bhaṭṭaṉ of Kavuśika(Kauśika)-gōtra received a sum of three paḻaṅkāśu and had agreed to burn the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājarājadevaṟkuyāṇṭu 10 4 jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷa
ttūrkkoṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭut tirukkaccūr tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyanārkku Immaṇṭalattuc ceṅkāṭṭuk koṭṭa
ttu mākaṉūrnāṭṭup piḷḷaippākkamāṉa kaiytavakaiytavanallūr koṟṟaṉ koṟṟaṉ tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉ celvap
piḷḷaivaitta cantiviḷakku 1 Ivviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkoyiṟkāṇiyuṭaiya civa- brāhmaṇaṉ kavucikaṉ Āḷumpirāṉ U
ṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāṉa catācivapaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu 3 Ippaḻaṅkācu muṉṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ivviḷakku Onṟum canti
rātittavarai Erippeṉākac cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭuteṉ Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāṉa catācivapaṭṭaṉeṉ Itu paṉmāheśvaraStops here.
Digital edition of SII 26.287 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
